sections.paragraph:
m. plur. (from the noun נַעַר.)-

(1) childhood, Gen 46:34.

(2) youth, adolescence, Psa 71:5, 17 Psa 71:17אֵשֶׁת נְעוּרֶיךָ “the wife of thy youth,” whom thou marriedst when young, Pro 5:18 בְּנֵי הַנְּעוּרִים children of youth, begotten in youth, Psa 127:4. Metaph. of the youth of the people of Israel, Jer 2:2 3:4 Eze 16:22, 60 Eze 16:60compare זְקֻנִים.
